name: Buy a Raspberry Pi AI Kit
snippet: The Raspberry Pi AI Kit bundles the Raspberry Pi M.2 HAT+ with a Hailo AI acceleration module for use with Raspberry Pi 5.

name: AI Accelerator Hailo-8 For Edge Devices | Fully Integrated Memory
snippet: The Hailo-8 edge AI processor, featuring up to 26 tera-operations per second (TOPS), significantly outperforms all other edge processors.

name: Hacker's guide to the Raspberry Pi AI kit on Ubuntu
snippet: In this blog post, we will discuss our experiences trying to get the Hailo-8L accelerator and its software running on Ubuntu 24.04 LTS.

name: Unstructured Data Processing with a Raspberry Pi AI Kit — Hailo Edge AI
snippet: The AI Kit adds a neural network inference accelerator capable of 13 tera-operations per second (TOPS), which is pretty good for $70 US.

name: Raspberry Pi 5th generation Hailo-8 artificial intelligence AI kit M.2 Key
snippet: In stock This AI development kit features the Raspberry Pi 5 with Hailo-8 AI accelerator, offering 26TOPS computing power via M.2 Key M interface.
